item.title: CS61A Homework hw04
item.author: Author
item.description: Homework 4: Trees, Data Abstraction 作业链接：Homework 4: Trees, Data Abstraction 使用以下命令可以下载作业： wget https://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/~cs61a/sp21/hw/hw04/hw04.zip 本次作业的内容主要涉及抽象数据类型的编程，题目背景一般较为冗长，故不多加赘述，详见作业链接。 做完实验，恍如隔世，不禁感叹 最是人间留不住，朱颜辞镜花辞树。 Abstraction Q1: Weights 实现代码如下： def planet(size): """Construct a planet of some size.""" assert size > 0 "*** YOUR CODE HERE ***" return ['planet', size] def size(w): """Select the size of a planet.""" assert is_planet(w), 'must call size on a planet' "*** YOUR CODE HERE ***" return w[1] Q2: Balanced 实现代码如下： def balanced(m): """Return whether m is balanced.

item.title: CS61A week6 study note
item.author: Author
item.description: Week6 CS 61A 2021 Fall官网：CS 61A: Structure and Interpretation of Computer Programs 翻译视频：【计算机程序的构造和解释】精译【UC Berkeley 公开课-CS61A (Spring 2021)】-中英双语字幕 github:Maxwell2020152049/CS61A Lecture #13: Mutable Values Slide：13-Mutable_Values_full.pdf Lab：Lab 5: Python Lists, Data Abstraction, Trees 树的抽象层次（Tree: Layers of abstraction） 每一个层次的抽象都由上一个层次的抽象实现。 Each layer only uses the layer above it. 一种树的实现（A tree() implementation） 本节课使用以元组为树，以列表为子树的方法创建树。 创建如下的树，draw是CS 61A Coder中实现的函数，能够绘制不同类型的结构的图形： def tree(label, children=None): """ Creates a tree whose root node is labeled LABEL and optionally has CHILDREN, a list of trees.

item.title: CS61A Lab lab05
item.author: Author
item.description: Lab 5: Python Lists, Data Abstraction, Trees 实验链接：Lab 5: Python Lists, Data Abstraction, Trees 如何下载实验压缩包： wget https://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/~cs61a/sp21/lab/lab05/lab05.zip Required Questions List Comprehensions Q1: Couple 实现函数couple(s, t)，s和t是两个长度相同的列表，返回一个列表，第i个元素是[s[i], t[i]]。 实现代码如下： def couple(s, t): """Return a list of two-element lists in which the i-th element is [s[i], t[i]]. >>> a = [1, 2, 3] >>> b = [4, 5, 6] >>> couple(a, b) [[1, 4], [2, 5], [3, 6]] >>> c = ['c', 6] >>> d = ['s', '1'] >>> couple(c, d) [['c', 's'], [6, '1']] """ assert len(s) == len(t) "*** YOUR CODE HERE ***" return [[x, y] for x, y in zip(s, t)] Data Abstraction 本实验提供了一个城市的抽象数据类型（ADT），用法如下：

item.title: CS61A Project Cats
item.author: Author
item.description: Project 2: CS 61A Autocorrected Typing Software Project地址：Project 2: CS 61A Autocorrected Typing Software 使用如下命令可以下载项目： wget https://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/~cs61a/sp21/proj/cats/cats.zip 项目的最终效果类似：Final Product Phase 1: Typing Problem 1 (1 pt) 实现choose(paragraphs, select, k)函数： paragraphs：一个字符串列表 select：选择函数，参数为字符串，若符合要求，返回True，否则返回False k：函数返回第k个符合要求的字符串 使用如下命令进行解锁测试： python3 ok -q 01 -u --local 过程如下： ===================================================================== Assignment: Project 2: Cats OK, version v1.18.1 ===================================================================== ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ Unlocking tests At each "? ", type what you would expect the output to be. Type exit() to quit --------------------------------------------------------------------- Problem 1 > Suite 1 > Case 1 (cases remaining: 102) >>> from cats import choose >>> ps = ['short', 'really long', 'tiny'] >>> s = lambda p: len(p) <= 5 >>> choose(ps, s, 0) ?

item.title: CS61A Lab lab03
item.author: Author
item.description: Lab 3: Recursion, Tree Recursion 实验链接：Lab 3: Recursion, Tree Recursion 如何下载实验压缩包： wget https://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/~cs61a/sp21/lab/lab03/lab03.zip What Would Python Display? Q1: WWPD: Recursion 使用如下命令进行测试： 如果结果是函数，就输入Function，如果是错误就输入Error，如果没有输出就输入Nothing，如果出现无限循环或者无限递归，输出Infinite。 python3 ok -q recursion-wwpd -u --local 结果如下： ===================================================================== Assignment: Lab 3 OK, version v1.18.1 ===================================================================== ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ Unlocking tests At each "? ", type what you would expect the output to be. Type exit() to quit --------------------------------------------------------------------- Recursion > Suite 1 > Case 1 (cases remaining: 1) What would Python display?

item.title: CS61A Homework hw03
item.author: Author
item.description: Homework 3: Recursion 作业链接：Homework 3: Recursion 使用以下命令可以下载作业： wget https://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/~cs61a/sp21/hw/hw03/hw03.zip Required questions Q1: Num eights 实现一个递归函数num_eights(x)，返回x的位等于8的个数。 不允许使用=、+=等赋值运算符。 实现代码如下： def num_eights(x): """Returns the number of times 8 appears as a digit of x. >>> num_eights(3) 0 >>> num_eights(8) 1 >>> num_eights(88888888) 8 >>> num_eights(2638) 1 >>> num_eights(86380) 2 >>> num_eights(12345) 0 >>> from construct_check import check >>> # ban all assignment statements >>> check(HW_SOURCE_FILE, 'num_eights', ... ['Assign', 'AugAssign']) True """ "*** YOUR CODE HERE ***" if x < 10: return 1 if x == 8 else 0 return (1 if x % 10 == 8 else 0) + num_eights(x // 10) 使用python中布尔值和整数相加返回整数的特性，也可以实现如下：

item.title: CS61A Lab lab02
item.author: Author
item.description: Lab 2: Higher-Order Functions, Lambda Expressions 实验链接：Lab 2: Higher-Order Functions, Lambda Expressions 如何下载实验压缩包： wget https://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/~cs61a/sp21/lab/lab02/lab02.zip What Would Python Display? Q1: WWPD: Lambda the Free 输入以下命令进行测试： 如果结果是函数，就输入Function，如果是错误就输入Error，如果没有输出就输入Nothing。 python3 ok -q lambda -u --local 过程如下： ===================================================================== Assignment: Lab 2 OK, version v1.18.1 ===================================================================== ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ Unlocking tests At each "? ", type what you would expect the output to be. Type exit() to quit --------------------------------------------------------------------- Lambda the Free > Suite 1 > Case 1 (cases remaining: 7) Q: Which of the following statements describes a difference between a def statement and a lambda expression?

item.title: CS61A week5 study note
item.author: Author
item.description: Week5 CS 61A 2021 Fall官网：CS 61A: Structure and Interpretation of Computer Programs 翻译视频：【计算机程序的构造和解释】精译【UC Berkeley 公开课-CS61A (Spring 2021)】-中英双语字幕 github:Maxwell2020152049/CS61A Lecture #12: Dictionaries, Matrices, and Trees： Project：Project 2: CS 61A Autocorrected Typing Software Slide：12-Trees_full.pdf or 12-Trees.html 抽象层次的复习（Review: Layers of abstraction） Python类型的复习（Review: Python types） 字典（Dictionary） 字典是一种可修改的键-值对映射（key-value pair）。 可以使用Key in Dict检查某个Key是否是字典的键，若是，返回True；若不是，返回False。 eg： # Dictionaries states = { "CA": "California", "DE": "Delaware", "NY": "New York", "TX": "Texas", "WY": "Wyoming" } print(len(states)) print("CA" in states) print("ZZ" in states) 输出：

item.title: CS61A week4 study note
item.author: Author
item.description: Week4 CS 61A 2021 Fall官网：CS 61A: Structure and Interpretation of Computer Programs 翻译视频：【计算机程序的构造和解释】精译【UC Berkeley 公开课-CS61A (Spring 2021)】-中英双语字幕 github:Maxwell2020152049/CS61A Lecture #9: Still More on Functions Lab：Lab 3: Recursion, Tree Recursion Slide：09-Function_Examples_full.pdf 练习：翻转数字（Exercise: Reversing Digits） 实现一个reverse digits(n)函数，返回翻转的n： def reverse_digits(n): """Assuming N >= 0 is an integer. Return the number whose base-10 representation is the reverse of that of N. >>> reverse_digits(0) 0 >>> reverse_digits(1) 1 >>> reverse_digits(123) 321 >>> reverse_digits(10) 1 >>> reverse_digits(12321) 12321 >>> reverse_digits(2222222) 2222222 >>> reverse_digits(102) 201 """ assert type(n) is int and n >= 0 if n < 10: return n return reverse_digits(n // 10) + (n % 10) * 10 ** (num_digits(n) - 1) def num_digits(x): """Return the number of decimal digits in the positive integer X.

item.title: CS61A week3 study note
item.author: Author
item.description: Week3 CS 61A 2021 Fall官网：CS 61A: Structure and Interpretation of Computer Programs 翻译视频：【计算机程序的构造和解释】精译【UC Berkeley 公开课-CS61A (Spring 2021)】-中英双语字幕 github:Maxwell2020152049/CS61A Lecture #6: Recursion Lab：Lab 2: Higher-Order Functions, Lambda Expressions Slide：06-Recursion_full.pdf 一个有意思的高阶函数： def print_sums(n): print(n) def next_sum(k): return print_sums(n+k) return next_sum print_sums(1)(3)(5) 输出： 1 4 9 Currying 一种将多参数函数转化为一系列单参数函数的方法，也称部分实例化（partial instantiation）。 eg.： from operator import add def curry2(f): return lambda x: \ lambda y: \ f(x, y) print(curry2(add)(30)(12)) print(curry2(add)(30)) 输出： 42 <function curry2.<locals>.<lambda>.<locals>.<lambda> at 0x7fa093dc1620> 函数哲学（Philosophy of Functions） 语法规范说明了函数调用的语法（函数参数） 语义规范说明了如果工作： 前置条件说明了对调用者的要求 后置条件说明了来自函数实现者的承诺 Specifies a contract between caller and function implementer.
